purpose: Resolve the multi-track write collision on HubOfferToConfirmationTruthProjection by locking par_321 as the only canonical projection writer while adjacent tracks publish typed deltas only.

discipline.responsibility: Own offer-selection and offer-expiry deltas only.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Emit HubTruthProjectionDeltaEnvelope entries for offer_facet changes.

discipline.responsibility: Own the reducer and persisted projection row.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Consume delta envelopes and persist the canonical truth projection.

discipline.responsibility: Own message and acknowledgement deltas only.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Emit practice_visibility delta envelopes; do not upsert HubOfferToConfirmationTruthProjection directly.

discipline.responsibility: Own fallback and reopen deltas only.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Emit fallback_linkage delta envelopes; do not overwrite calmer truth states.

discipline.responsibility: Own manage-capability and practice-visibility deltas only.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Emit manage_visibility delta envelopes and consume current projection snapshots.

discipline.responsibility: Own replay and repair through the same reducer only.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Replay delta envelopes or dispatch repair requests; never fork a second persisted projection writer.
